title: catalog audit cannot resolve inline/multi-image figure semantics from extract rules
resolution: 已涵蓋於 in-tick repair_catalog_metadata（確定性鄰近 caption 綁定 + captionless/code/diagram exclude）；提案 audit agent 不在其視野故誤報引擎缺口。本書 live crit=0、圖表目錄已收斂。
evidence: ryden_cosmology smoke H7 persists after chapter-boundary fix and caption-merge regex. Residual cases are multi-image subfigures with local captions (a)/(b)/(c) plus prose blocks that mention Figure N.M without a standalone caption block, leaving catalog empty_captions=8.
proposal: Add a deterministic catalog-semantic repair path that can group adjacent visual blocks into one figure, promote inline Figure/Table references into semantic ids/captions when evidence is local, and mark non-catalog local visuals without requiring manual overrides.
